Commercial Cleaning Services

Specialized, results-driven cleaning for every type of commercial facility in the GTA, Durham, and Clarington.

Commercial Office Cleaning

Office Cleaning Toronto & GTA

A clean office signals professionalism, boosts employee morale, and creates a strong first impression for every client who walks through your door. Our commercial office cleaning programs are tailored to your schedule and standards.

  • Daily, weekly, or bi-weekly scheduling
  • Floor cleaning, vacuuming, and hard surface care
  • Washroom sanitization and restocking
  • Kitchen and break room cleaning
  • High-touch surface disinfection
  • Eco-friendly WHMIS-compliant products
Get Office Cleaning Quote
Medical Office Cleaning

Healthcare Cleaning Durham & GTA

Medical and dental offices require a level of cleaning that goes far beyond standard janitorial services. We follow strict healthcare cleaning protocols to ensure patient safety, infection control compliance, and a consistently sterile environment.

  • Hospital-grade disinfection of all clinical surfaces
  • Waiting room, reception, and exam room cleaning
  • Infection control protocol compliance
  • Healthcare-approved, non-toxic cleaning agents
  • Discreet service that works around patient schedules
Get Medical Cleaning Quote
Post-Construction Cleaning

Post-Construction Cleaning GTA

Construction leaves behind fine dust, adhesive residue, paint overspray, and debris that standard cleaning cannot handle. Our post-construction cleaning specialists have the equipment and expertise to make your space completely move-in or occupancy ready.

  • Full dust removal from all surfaces and fixtures
  • Window, glass, and frame cleaning
  • Floor sweep, scrub, and polish
  • Debris and waste disposal
  • HVAC vent and ductwork surface cleaning
  • Final inspection walkthrough
Get Post-Construction Quote
Building Common Areas

Lobby & Common Area Cleaning

The shared spaces of your building — lobbies, hallways, stairwells, and elevators — are the first thing tenants and visitors see. We maintain these high-traffic areas to the highest standards, ensuring a welcoming and professional environment at all times.

  • Lobby floor cleaning and polishing
  • Elevator interior cleaning and disinfection
  • Stairwell sweeping and mopping
  • Glass doors and partition cleaning
  • Shared washroom maintenance
Get Common Area Quote
Retail Cleaning

Retail Store Cleaning Toronto

A clean retail environment directly impacts sales, customer dwell time, and brand perception. We provide efficient, minimally disruptive retail cleaning that keeps your store spotless — before opening, after closing, or during off-peak hours.

  • Sales floor vacuuming and mopping
  • Display case and fixture wiping
  • Fitting room cleaning and sanitization
  • Washroom cleaning and restocking
  • Stock room and back-of-house cleaning
  • Flexible scheduling around store hours
Get Retail Cleaning Quote
Warehouse Cleaning

Warehouse & Industrial Cleaning

Industrial and warehouse environments require heavy-duty cleaning equipment, specialized techniques, and strict health and safety compliance. We handle large-scale floor maintenance, dust control, and general cleanliness to support your operations and meet regulatory standards.

  • Large-area floor sweeping and scrubbing
  • Loading dock and receiving area cleaning
  • Dust control and debris removal
  • Washroom and lunchroom cleaning
  • OHSA-compliant safety practices
Get Warehouse Cleaning Quote
Large-Scale & Public Sector

Cleaning Solutions for Large Organizations

We handle the scale, compliance requirements, and performance expectations of large public and private sector facilities.

Government & Municipal
  • Municipal offices and city halls
  • Community centres and recreation facilities
  • Public libraries and administrative buildings
  • Police, fire, and emergency service facilities
Healthcare & Education
  • Hospital networks and healthcare campuses
  • Long-term care and assisted living facilities
  • Schools, colleges, and university buildings
  • Infection control-compliant cleaning protocols
Corporate & Commercial
  • Corporate head offices and executive floors
  • Multi-tenant office towers and commercial parks
  • Data centres and secure facilities
  • Dedicated account manager and compliance reports

All large-organization contracts include a dedicated account manager, custom cleaning schedules, compliance documentation, and a guaranteed 24h response to any service request.
